Specialties We Serve

We Understand Ophthalmology

Every service line, every patient journey, every growth challenge — built on deep knowledge of India's eye care landscape.

Digital Growth Services

Specialized Marketing Built for You

Every service is architected around the ophthalmology patient journey — from awareness through to surgical conversion.

Core

Search Engine Optimization

Rank #1 when patients search for LASIK, Cataract and Retina treatments in your city. Organic authority that compounds over time.

Future-Ready

Answer Engine Optimization

When patients ask ChatGPT or Gemini for the best eye hospital, your practice surfaces first. We build that positioning now.

New

Generative Engine Optimization

Visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity and AI-driven platforms — before your competition understands it exists.

High Intent

Google Ads

Reach patients actively seeking surgical care. Precision bidding, ophthalmology keywords, and ad copy that converts.

Scale

Meta Ads

Consistent enquiries at scale through Facebook and Instagram campaigns built around ophthalmology patient personas.

Local

Google Business Profile

Dominate local map search. Stronger rankings and a profile that converts every visitor into a consultation call.

Brand

Social Media Marketing

Clinical authority and patient trust across platforms. Content that positions your surgeons as the definitive experts.

Foundation

Website & Content

Conversion-optimized websites built exclusively for ophthalmology. Every page moves a visitor toward booking.

Why Eye Hospitals Choose Us

We Are Not A Generalist Agency

We made a deliberate choice to work exclusively with ophthalmology. That singular focus is what separates our results from everyone else.

01

Industry-Specific Expertise

Every strategy built specifically for ophthalmology. We know the patient psychology, competitive landscape, and surgical conversion levers in your market.

02

Outcomes Over Optics

We measure consultation bookings and surgical conversions — not impressions or reach. Every rupee tracked to a real business result.

03

Practice Growth Focus

We attract and convert high-value enquiries — the kind that turn into consultations and surgeries, not just website traffic.

04

Long-Term Growth Partner

Sustainable practice growth — not short-term campaigns. We are invested in your 5-year trajectory, not last month's report.
